footer.tagline: A Mantle intake starter with a seeded branching form.

sections.title: {{BRAND}} is ready to collect the first real answers
A practical intake page before a custom workflow exists
sections.body: Use this starter when the first useful product is a structured response: RSVP, application, onboarding, request, or lead qualification.

items.body: The public page explains why someone should respond, then asks a few branching questions instead of dropping them into a blank form.
The first version stores responses in Mantle. The owner can later add review queues, email routing, scoring, or member login.

sections.title: What this intake starter demonstrates
sections.body: The copy is placeholder, but the shape is real enough for a first provision test.

items.title: Multi-step form
items.body: Questions are grouped into small steps so the first screen stays focused.

items.title: Conditional questions
items.body: Follow-up fields appear only when the previous answer makes them relevant.

items.title: Result message
items.body: Different answers can show different confirmation copy after submission.

items.title: Protected public endpoint
items.body: The form is ready for Turnstile when Landing provisions a site key and secret.

sections.title: Reserve a seat or ask for updates
sections.body: This seeded workshop RSVP shows how intake can branch without becoming a full quiz engine.

steps.title: Basic details
steps.body: Start with the minimum information needed to identify the response.

steps.title: Preferences
steps.body: Follow-up questions change based on the RSVP answer.

steps.title: Send response
steps.body: The first version stores the response. Email routing can be connected later.

options.label: Yes
options.body: Reserve a seat and share session preferences.

options.label: Maybe
options.body: Keep me on the list and follow up.

options.label: No
options.body: I cannot attend, but I may want updates.

fields.name: note
fields.label: Anything else?
fields.placeholder: Share access needs, questions, or context.

results.title: You are on the list
results.body: The owner can review the RSVP in Mantle and follow up with final details.

results.title: We will follow up
results.body: The response is saved as maybe, so the owner can confirm later.

results.title: You will receive updates
results.body: The owner can use this response to send future dates or event notes.

sections.title: Questions to replace after launch
sections.body: Use this block for the objections or routing details that matter for the real intake.

items.title: Can this become an application form?
items.body: Yes. Replace the seed questions with eligibility, availability, or review fields.

items.title: Can this become a quiz?
items.body: Later. The first slice keeps branching and result copy simple before adding scoring.

items.title: Where do responses go?
items.body: The starter stores them as Mantle intake submissions through `/api/intake`.

sections.title: Turn this RSVP into {{BRAND}}'s real intake
sections.body: Keep the branching form, replace the questions, and add routing only when the owner knows who should receive each response.

intake-submissions.name: Sample Responder
intake-submissions.note: I would like details before confirming.
